content: The direct comparison between intrinsic curiosity modules (ICM), random network distillation (RND) and hand-coded curious agents can be reframed as an active neural architecture search problem that selects for agent memory architectures aligned with the emergent curiosity type of the agent. This creates a closed-loop system where the agent’s intrinsic curiosity drives the evolution of its own episodic memory structure, rather than fixing memory architecture upfront to compare curiosity methods.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
